doc: Voice patch for chord-player.json (ADR-0032). One monophonic saw PAD voice: a held freq drives the oscillator, a held gate the slow-attack ADSR. NO filter here — the brightness Good Button drives a single master filter on the summed mix (host post-mix). The pad ADSR (slow attack/release) is baked at the values the host's /env controls used to set (per-voice params aren't host-addressable in the hosted-voice model). interface: freq/gate in, audio/active out.

nodes.doc: Saw pad tone (harmonics for the master filter to shape).
Slow-attack pad envelope (linear CV), gated by the voicer.
Shape the linear envelope CV into an exponential-style volume curve (x^2).
